Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: W37
Cloud Globe Wand

Once in a while, 3 random enemy units take 55% more magic damage for 4 sec. They also take 120000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage for 4 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 98-100

First trigger: 3 sec
